retry_reason: Put operations always succeed when called on a valid pointer; retry would be a double-free.
contract_summary: Conditional put wrapper to end a credential critical section. If needput is true, it releases the caller's reference on the aa_label; otherwise it is a no-op. After calling with needput=true, the caller must not reference the label again. This function is a clean way to handle the common pattern of releasing a label only when ownership was acquired.

judge.reason: The sole purpose is to conditionally decrement the refcount of an aa_label via aa_put_label; no other logic exists.

check.reason: The operation matches the function code: aa_put_label(label) is called when needput is true. The access path 'label.count.count.refcount' correctly starts from the critical variable (parameter 1 'label') and follows the fields to the refcount_t, consistent with the callee's type chain aa_label--aa_label_count--kref--refcount_t. Segment counts (4 each) are equal.
